issues: Special keys are not fully aligned with the goal. The script only handles Shift, Enter, and Backspace but misses other special keys (e.g., Ctrl, Alt). Relevant code: `elif key == "shift":`
No handling of numeric and alphabetical keys specifically called out in the goal. Current check relies on key length, which may not be robust. Relevant code: `if len(key) == 1:`
summary: Handles basic errors and captures some special keys but lacks full alignment with all requirements.
